'''Ala Kimbo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who was wanted by the [[Hutt Clan]] for unknown reasons. He believed that he could escape the Hutt Clan by masquerading as a prison guard at [[Desolation Alley]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed the bounty and proved him wrong.

==Behind the scenes==
Ala Kimbo's Bounty is worth 4,500 credits alive and 2,200 dead. He was presumably taken alive as he was worth more alive.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
